narrative:
Westlake City Sd city school district has 25,216 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.8% D−R vs -3.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
